name: Operation Watchman
subtitle: 90-Day Men's Formation
notes: Full 90-day curriculum (v0.6). Five reading tracks, each a curated scripture arc; days 1-7 preserve the original sample week. Reflection prompts are authored in 13 weekly blocks themed to that week's LBCF 1689 confession anchor. Generated by scripts/build-watchman-90.js — edit the arrays there and re-run, do not hand-edit this file.

graduation.title: Watchman, you have stood your post.
graduation.body: Ninety days. Five readings, six disciplines, the LORD's mercy daily new. The work is not finished — the post is permanent. What was disciplined for a season now becomes a way of life. Husband, father, citizen, watchman: go and do likewise.
graduation.verse: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith. — 2 Timothy 4:7

confession_anchors.title: Of the Holy Scriptures
confession_anchors.summary: The Holy Scriptures are the only sufficient, certain, and infallible rule of all saving knowledge, faith, and obedience. Begin here — the post is built on the Word.

confession_anchors.title: Of God and of the Holy Trinity
confession_anchors.summary: One living and true God — eternal, infinite, immutable — subsisting in three Persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, of one substance, power, and eternity. You stand watch for this God.

confession_anchors.title: Of the Fall of Man, of Sin, and of the Punishment thereof
confession_anchors.summary: Our first parents fell from original righteousness, and we with them. We are by nature children of wrath, dead in sin. Know yourself rightly so you may know Christ rightly.

confession_anchors.title: Of Christ the Mediator
confession_anchors.summary: The Lord Jesus — eternal Son, made man — is the one Mediator between God and men: prophet, priest, and king. The whole post stands or falls with Him.

confession_anchors.title: Of Justification
confession_anchors.summary: God freely justifies those He effectually calls — not by infusing righteousness, but by pardoning sin and reckoning Christ's righteousness to them, received by faith alone. Your standing is not in your streak.

confession_anchors.title: Of Sanctification
confession_anchors.summary: Those who are united to Christ are also really and personally sanctified — the dominion of sin destroyed, holiness grown by the Word and Spirit. These disciplines are means of grace, not means of meriting grace.

confession_anchors.title: Of Saving Faith
confession_anchors.summary: Faith is the gift of God, wrought by the Spirit, by which we receive and rest upon Christ alone for salvation. It may be weak or strong but is always victorious in the end.

confession_anchors.title: Of Repentance unto Life and Salvation
confession_anchors.summary: Repentance is a saving grace, by which a sinner — apprehending his sin and the mercy of God in Christ — turns from sin to God with full purpose of new obedience. Examine. Confess. Turn.

confession_anchors.title: Of the Perseverance of the Saints
confession_anchors.summary: Those whom God has accepted in the Beloved can neither totally nor finally fall from the state of grace. He who began a good work will finish it. Stand the post knowing the Captain will not lose you.

confession_anchors.title: Of the Law of God
confession_anchors.summary: The moral law forever binds all, justified and others alike — not as a covenant of works to merit life, but as a rule of life informing them of God's will and their duty. The law cannot save but it can show the way.

confession_anchors.title: Of Christian Liberty and Liberty of Conscience
confession_anchors.summary: Christ has purchased liberty for believers — freedom from the curse of the law, from this present evil world, and from the bondage of sin. God alone is Lord of the conscience. Discipline freely, not under compulsion.

confession_anchors.title: Of Religious Worship and the Sabbath Day
confession_anchors.summary: The Lord's Day is to be kept holy unto Him — corporate worship, family worship, works of necessity and mercy, holy rest from worldly employments. The watchman's week has a rhythm given by God.

confession_anchors.title: Of Marriage
confession_anchors.summary: Marriage is between one man and one woman, ordained for mutual help, lawful issue, and preventing uncleanness. Husbands love your wives as Christ loved the church. The watchman's first post is the home.

disciplines.title: Cold Shower
disciplines.theme: Discipline the body, strengthen the mind

disciplines.title: Fasting
disciplines.theme: Skip a meal · Fast from distraction
